name: ocas-spot
description: Use when checking appointment availability or booking services at salons, spas, restaurants, and other service venues. Supports Acuity Scheduling and Square Appointments with an extensible platform knowledge base. Trigger phrases: 'book an appointment at', 'check availability at', 'when can I get a [service]', 'find me a slot at', 'is [venue] available'.
author: Indigo Karasu

self_update.mechanism: version-checked tarball from GitHub via gh CLI
